overall.description: A static first-person view of a cyberpunk urban street in a video game environment (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring a prominent digital billboard advertisement reading 'NEW JOB? GET AN UPGRADE!' depicting factory workers, surrounded by dense, vertically-stacked futuristic buildings with neon signage and industrial details. The scene is set in a narrow urban canyon with diffused lighting and no visible pedestrian or vehicle activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk urban canyon with corporate advertisement display

agents.ego_description: stationary, observing the large digital billboard and surrounding dense urban architecture

entered.detail: Large vertical digital advertisement displaying 'NEW JOB? GET AN UPGRADE!' with three workers in yellow safety vests at an assembly line
Tall, vertically-stacked multi-level buildings with industrial scaffolding, neon signs, and dense architectural details characteristic of cyberpunk aesthetic
Yellow illuminated sign with Asian characters on the building facade
Metal scaffolding and industrial piping attached to the building exterior with various technical equipment
Rust-colored metal paneling on the building wall adjacent to the billboard

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary in a narrow cyberpunk urban canyon, focused on a large digital billboard advertisement promoting job upgrades. Dense, multi-level buildings with industrial scaffolding and neon signage fill the left side of the frame, while the right side features the prominent advertisement against an orange metal wall. The environment is devoid of pedestrians and vehicles, with mixed natural and artificial lighting illuminating the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a desolate cyberpunk urban canyon, focusing on the stark contrast between industrial decay and digital commercialism. It begins centered on a large digital billboard promoting job upgrades, which stands out against a weathered orange metal wall. To the left, the view is framed by dense, multi-level buildings characterized by complex industrial scaffolding and flickering neon signage. The scene remains still and silent, with the mixed natural and artificial lighting casting a diffused glow over the empty street, devoid of any pedestrians or vehicles.
